_source: Anvil-fork-of-Arbitrum tx 0xea2bc0637faf4b987a5df37069ea2bb02b7305a6f533f58ace3597c7173830a2 — UniV3 LP_CLOSE for tokenId 5467895 (the SAME NFT as lp_open/receipt.json — by design, so physical_identity_hash is byte-identical across the two registry rows). Teardown lane of UniswapLPStrategy run 2026-05-04, see tests/reports/anvil-sweep-2026-05-05/uniswap_lp/stdout.log line 'Intent 1/1 executed successfully. TX: 0xea2bc063...'.

logs._comment: UniV3 pool Burn event (emitter = pool 0xC31E54c7...). Signature: Burn(address indexed owner, int24 indexed tickLower, int24 indexed tickUpper, uint128 amount, uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1). Burn is emitted on decreaseLiquidity. tickLower=-199740, tickUpper=-197740 (matches LP_OPEN's Mint event ticks — same NFT, same range).

UniV3 pool Collect event (emitter = pool). Signature: Collect(address indexed owner, address recipient, int24 indexed tickLower, int24 indexed tickUpper, uint128 amount0, uint128 amount1). Carries principal + accrued fees. amount0=2294636 (USDC), amount1=979989999988069 (WETH).

UniV3 NFT manager DecreaseLiquidity event (emitter = NPM 0xC36442b4...). Signature: DecreaseLiquidity(uint256 indexed tokenId, uint128 liquidity, uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1). topics[1] is tokenId 5467895 (0x536ef7) — this is the close-side analogue of LP_OPEN's IncreaseLiquidity log. Having this log on the LP_CLOSE receipt lets the close-side recompute its physical_identity_hash from receipt facts alone (mirror of D1.S5 for LP_OPEN).
USDC Transfer (pool -> wallet): 2.294636 USDC withdrawn (amount0 from Collect).
WETH Transfer (pool -> wallet): 0.000979986... WETH withdrawn (amount1 from Collect).
